import React from 'react'; import { Button } from '../components/ui/button'; import { Card } from '../components/ui/card'; import { Mail, Phone, MapPin, Clock } from 'lucide-react'; const Contact = () => { return (
{/* Hero Section */}

); }; export default Contact;
